TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Taloan O pahahana no matoasay a matayal. Kangkang Ilakokagnkag i tila i taloan. Malalok ko Amis a mataial. Mafana kiso a mikangkang haw. anip Mafana kiso a mianip haw? Mafana ko matoasay anip. Mikapkap Adihay ko lengos no facal . Malaiok ko Matoasay amikapkap. Pahilyw Sapipatay to fao no anip .ta makapah ko lengew no anip. Mipanay to Adihay ko panay i pala . Malipaha ko faloco no matoasay Pahanghang Malolay a matayal ko matoasay . Pahanghang to a matayl,
S.PHON: ta…ĺo~uan o~u pańßańßana no~u mato~uasaj a mataja…ĺ. kaŇčkaŇč i…ĺako~uka*nka* i ti…ĺa i ta…ĺo~uan. ma…ĺa…ĺo~uk ko~u amis a mataia…ĺ. mafana kiso~u a mikaŇčkaŇč ńßaw. anip mafana kiso~u a mianip ńßaw? mafana ko~u mato~uasaj anip. mikapkap a…¨~…ģińßaj ko~u …ĺ…ôŇčo~us no~u fa ¶a…ĺ . ma…ĺaio~uk ko~u mato~uasaj amikapkap. pańßi…ĺjw sapipataj to~u fao~u no~u anip .ta makapańß ko~u …ĺ…ôŇč…ôw no~u anip. mipanaj to~u a…¨~…ģińßaj ko~u panaj i pa…ĺa . ma…ĺipańßa ko~u fa…ĺo~u ¶o~u no~u mato~uasaj pańßaŇčńßaŇč ma…ĺo~u…ĺaj a mataja…ĺ ko~u mato~uasaj . pańßaŇčńßaŇč to~u a mataj…ĺ,
S.FORM: Taloan O pahahana no matoasay a matayal. Kangkang Ilakokagnkag i tila i taloan. Malalok ko Amis a mataial. Mafana kiso a mikangkang haw. anip Mafana kiso a mianip haw? Mafana ko matoasay anip. Mikapkap Adihay ko lengos no facal . Malaiok ko Matoasay amikapkap. Pahilyw Sapipatay to fao no anip .ta makapah ko lengew no anip. Mipanay to Adihay ko panay i pala .
